<features>
- surface: asphalt/pavement
- features: multiple irregular holes/depressions in the surface
- contents: some holes appear to contain water or debris
</features>
<kb>
- IF [surface = asphalt AND features = multiple irregular holes/depressions] THEN [32]
- IF [surface = textured material AND features = uniform pattern of lines or colors] THEN [8]
- IF [surface = textured material AND features = repetitive bumps or small protrusions] THEN [4]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule for class 32 fires because the image shows an asphalt surface with multiple irregular holes/depressions.
</rule_check>

<response>32</response>
